note: Read-only inventory. Classifications and target_subtask values are RECOMMENDATIONS for subtasks 037-044 only; 036 changes no runtime code and no prompt bytes. Line/byte lengths for templates are exact (wc); inline-prompt lengths are approximate literal spans. prompt_id namespace is a PROPOSAL (see id_namespace_policy).

id_namespace_policy.core: existing FilesystemPromptLoader key = path minus .md, e.g. 'agent/system'
id_namespace_policy.constraints: lowercase [a-z0-9_./]; machine-stable; no timestamps/host state (mirrors load_versioned sha256[:12])

classification_vocabulary: KEEP (already-externalized core templates only; master-vocab, not an inline verdict)

core_templates.length: 11 L / 1049 B (subtask said 12 L; actual wc -l = 11)

skill_local_templates.call_site: CORRECTION: NOT loaded at ari-skill-paper-re/src/server.py:66 (that line is p.read_text() reading the PAPER file, not the prompt). grep across ari-skill-paper-re/src+tests finds NO runtime read_text() of replicator.md; _replicator_agent.py:10 references it only in a docstring ('mirroring prompts/replicator.md'). Actual agent prompt text comes from vendored paperbench.solvers.basicagent.prompts.templates (_replicator_agent.py:74).
skill_local_templates.note: Two-part REVIEW_REQUIRED: (a) mechanism inconsistency shared with replicate; (b) file appears orphaned/mirror-only vs the vendored PaperBench templates that actually run. Human decision: wire it, mark it a documentation mirror, or remove.

Section-level reviewer returning JSON. Reviewer-family; flag possible overlap with review_engine/peer_review for the 040 consolidation review.

Short, heavily f-string-interpolated; extraction cost > benefit. Bundle decision with the paper-server extraction.

findings.title: Three storage regimes, two mechanisms
findings.detail: core-loader (11 templates, versioned) vs skill read_text() (5 .md, unversioned) vs inline Python. No single baseline before this inventory.

findings.title: Mechanism inconsistency
findings.detail: 5 skill-local .md prompts bypass FilesystemPromptLoader (generator.py:64/77/93, auditor.py:130, and paper-re replicator.md which is additionally unwired). No version hash; invisible to Gate 10 (report/scripts/check_prompt_snapshots.py scans only ari-core/ari/prompts).

findings.title: High-value system prompts still inline
findings.detail: _SEMANTIC_SYSTEM_PROMPT (evaluator:790) and skill.paper.global_coherence (paper:2544, 5 hard rules + JSON edit schema) buried in 983-/2956-LOC files.

findings.title: Peer-reviewer duplication
findings.detail: review_engine.py:58 build_system_prompt + :443 Area Chair overlap core evaluator/peer_review.md; NOT byte-identical (venue-rubric-parameterized).

findings.title: Metric-extract overlap
findings.detail: evaluator:191 _METRIC_EXTRACT_SYS vs core evaluator/extract_metrics.md; related, distinct scope (optimize-target selection vs artifact extraction).

findings.title: Vendored strings must not be forked
findings.detail: _paperbench_bridge.py mirrors vendor/paperbench templates; idea primary path execs vendored VirSci utils/prompt.py.

findings.title: Counts are not audits
findings.detail: _paperbench_bridge.py (59) and evaluator/server.py (31) triple-quote totals are grep line-counts of '"""'; un-individually-read blocks are REVIEW_REQUIRED, not asserted prompts.

findings.title: No inline-prompt checker
findings.detail: scripts/docs/check_prompts.py does not exist (verified). Only report/scripts/check_prompt_snapshots.py (Gate 10, core-only). 043 will build the checker from this inventory; partial overlap with Gate 10.

findings.title: CORRECTION: replicator.md load site
findings.detail: Subtask 5.3 and plan 011 §2.3 claim replicator.md loads at paper-re server.py:66, but :66 is p.read_text() reading the PAPER file. No runtime read_text() of replicator.md exists in ari-skill-paper-re; it is referenced only in a docstring (_replicator_agent.py:10). The live agent prompt comes from vendored paperbench.solvers.basicagent.prompts.templates. replicator.md appears orphaned/mirror-only.

findings.title: MINOR CORRECTIONS to cited symbols/counts
findings.detail: (a) evaluator/peer_review.md is 11 L (subtask 5.1 said 12 L). (b) No module constant _GLOBAL_COHERENCE exists; paper:2544 is a local 'system_prompt' var (subtask shorthand). (c) paper:1638 is a 1-line role string, not a full prompt (substantive text in the _fig_inject_prompt user message).

findings.title: 011-vs-036 rubric-builder divergence
findings.detail: Plan 011 §5.x says rubric.py / rubric_template.py are 'rubric builders, not prompt text - leave in place'; subtask 036 §8.8 says classify MOVE_TO_CONFIGURABLE_PROMPT (scaffold-only). Recorded both; needs 037/041 reconciliation.
